channel.title: Home on AWS System Manager
channel.description: Recent content in Home on AWS System Manager

item.title: Week 1
item.description: WORKLOG - WEEK 1 Period: 20/04/2026 - 26/04/2026 Major: Computer Networking Team: First Cloud Journey 1. Weekly Objectives Complete Lab 02: Identity & Access Management (IAM Groups, Users, Policies, Roles, and Role Switching). Complete Lab 03: Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) Setup (Subnets, Route Tables, Internet Gateway, NAT Gateway) and Site-to-Site VPN (Strongswan, Transit Gateway). Complete Lab 04: Launch EC2 Windows/Linux instances, manage AMI/Snapshots, deploy User Management Web Apps (LAMP, Node.js), and implement Cost Governance controls.

item.title: Week 2
item.description: WORKLOG - WEEK 2 Period: 27/04/2026 - 03/05/2026 Major: Computer Networking Team: First Cloud Journey 1. Weekly Objectives Understand basic network infrastructure setup and database initialization using Amazon RDS. Deploy a Web application on Amazon EC2 connected to Amazon RDS (Lab 05). Practice Auto Scaling and Application Load Balancer to optimize system performance (Lab 06). Set up budgets and manage service costs using AWS Budgets (Lab 07). 2. Tasks & Schedule Day Task Start Date Completion Source Mon Learn about VPC, EC2, RDS 27/04/2026 27/04/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 05 Tue Lab 05: Deploy EC2 & RDS 28/04/2026 28/04/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 05 Wed Learn about Auto Scaling and Load Balancing 29/04/2026 29/04/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 06 Thu Lab 06: Auto Scaling and ALB (Part 1) 30/04/2026 30/04/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 06 Fri Lab 06: Auto Scaling and ALB (Part 2) 01/05/2026 01/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 06 Sat Lab 07: AWS Budgets 02/05/2026 02/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 07 Sun Review, cleanup resources, and finalize documentation 03/05/2026 03/05/2026 Internal 3.

item.title: Week 4
item.description: WORKLOG - WEEK 4 Period: 11/05/2026 - 17/05/2026 Major: Computer Networking Team: First Cloud Journey 1. Weekly Objectives Manage multi-account environments with AWS Organizations and IAM Identity Center (Lab 12). Implement automated backup and data recovery strategies with AWS Backup (Lab 13). Build a Hybrid Storage solution connecting On-premise to Cloud via AWS Storage Gateway (Lab 24). 2. Tasks & Schedule Day Task Start Date Completion Source Mon Explore AWS Organizations & IAM Identity Center 11/05/2026 11/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 12 Tue Practice Lab 12: Multi-account & Centralized Access 12/05/2026 12/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 12 Wed Explore AWS Backup architecture 13/05/2026 13/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 13 Thu Practice Lab 13: Backup Plan & Test Restore 14/05/2026 14/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 13 Fri Explore Hybrid Cloud with AWS Storage Gateway 15/05/2026 15/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 24 Sat Practice Lab 24: File Gateway configuration 16/05/2026 16/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 24 Sun Finalize Worklog, cleanup resources 17/05/2026 17/05/2026 Internal 3.

item.title: Week 5
item.description: WEEK 5 WORKLOG Time: 18/05/2026 - 24/05/2026 Major: Computer Networking Team: First Cloud Journey 1. Weekly Objectives Configure web application firewall with AWS WAF to protect applications (Lab 26). Classify and manage resources centrally using Tags and Resource Groups (Lab 27). Enhance security by creating restricted IAM policies (Lab 30). 2. Schedule & Tasks Day Task Start Date Completion Date Reference Monday Learn about AWS WAF and Web ACLs 18/05/2026 18/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 26 Tuesday Practice Lab 26: Deploy application and protect with AWS WAF 19/05/2026 19/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 26 Wednesday Learn about EC2 Tags and AWS Resource Groups 20/05/2026 20/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 27 Thursday Practice Lab 27: Resource classification and Resource Group creation 21/05/2026 21/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 27 Friday Learn about advanced IAM Policies (Restricted Policies) 22/05/2026 22/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 30 Saturday Practice Lab 30: Create IAM Restricted Policy & User 23/05/2026 23/05/2026 AWS Study Group - Lab 30 Sunday Summary, resource cleanup, and complete Week 5 Document 24/05/2026 24/05/2026 Internal 3.
